svg.title: BCM Substrate Craft — Dumbbell Architecture with Rifled Venturi
svg.desc: Engineering cross-section of the BCM substrate craft showing Pump A (fore), Pump B (aft), rifled Venturi tunnel with curl at L1, 12 probe arcs, and chi freeboard envelope. The curl at L1 creates orthogonal mode space — the Pythagorean right angle that prevents stellar m=1 coupling to the f/2 heartbeat.
svg.text: BCM substrate craft — dumbbell with rifled Venturi
Stephen Justin Burdick Sr. — Emerald Entities LLC — GIBUSH Systems

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the rifled Venturi bore and why it creates the curl')
sendPrompt('Explain the node clamp at L1')

svg.text: sigma flow: B → tunnel → A → eject → probe arc → return → B
